zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym於1529年出生在威爾士卡迪甘史爾爾-達德時，她的父親Gwilim Ap Einion50歲，母親Mrs. Einon45歲。她於大約1550年與Philip ap Jevan Gwilim在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根布利特賀迪爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在威爾士格拉莫爾根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym于1529年出生在威尔士卡迪甘史爾爾-達德时，她的父亲Gwilim Ap Einion50岁，母亲Mrs. Einon45岁。她于大约1550年与Philip ap Jevan Gwilim在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根布利特賀迪爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在威尔士格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym was born in 1529, in Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Wales, her father, Gwilim Ap Einion, was 50 and her mother, Mrs. Einon, was 45. She married Philip ap Jevan Gwilim about 1550, in Brithdir, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym est née en 1529, à Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Galles, son père, Gwilim Ap Einion, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Einon, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Philip ap Jevan Gwilim environ 1550, à Brithdir, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée à Glamorgan, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym 1529 in Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwilim Ap Einion 50 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Einon 45. Sie hat um 1550 in Brithdir, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Philip ap Jevan Gwilim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in Glamorgan, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym è nata il nel 1529 nel Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Galles, sua padre, Gwilim Ap Einion, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Einon, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Philip ap Jevan Gwilim circa 1550, nel Brithdir, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel Glamorgan, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilymが1529年にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアルウイン-ダフイッドで生まれた時，父Gwilim Ap Einionは50歳，母Mrs. Einonは45歳であった。約1550年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンブリスディルでPhilip ap Jevan Gwilimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はウェールズグラモーガンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym(이)가 1529년 웨일스 카디건실르 w이-다피드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwilim Ap Einion(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Einon(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 대략 1550년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 브리스디르에서 Philip ap Jevan Gwilim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스 글램르건에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym nasceu em 1529, em Llwyn-Dafydd, Cardiganshire, Gales, seu pai, Gwilim Ap Einion, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Einon, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip ap Jevan Gwilim aproximadamente 1550, em Brithdir, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em Glamorgan, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian  Wanllian verch Gwilym родилась в 1529 г. в местности ллвин-дафидд, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gwilim Ap Einion было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Einon, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip ap Jevan Gwilim около 1550 г. в местности бритдир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в местности глэморган, Уэльс.

Se casó con Philip ap Jevan Gwilim aproximadamente 1550, en Brithdir, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en Glamorgan, Gales.
